start.text: The Reaper returns to the battlefield...
Listen to the roar of the cannons...
The storm sweeps through, leaving trembling in its wake...

start_boss.text: Even the strong will bow their heads...
Pleasure will eventually fade into calm...
The dead will never return home...

retreat.text: Even if we leave for now... the storm will return...
Wait for the gale to subside... and the downpour will follow...
Surviving is no disgrace... the blood still boils and burns...

out_of_missiles.text: Too bad I can't draw my sword myself...
There's never just one sword in hand...

engaged.text: The flash of a blade... leaves behind streaks of blood...
Heaven collapses... there is no savior...
The death bell tolls... until the sea of death...

need_help.text: I've long grown accustomed to fighting alone...
Rushing in will only cause more trouble...
Redemption never belongs to those who wield the sword...

pursuing.text: The void is the finest grave for all...

hull_90.text: Come... until the brave fall dead...
That's right... you really have a chance to defeat a god this time...
Look... the stars sing for the passing of life...
Fear not... the purity of the soul comes from a death without regret...

hull_50.text: Next... the stars will bear witness...
Just like this... as all things burn...

hull_30.text: The flames of war still burn... the storm will sweep through again...
The Reaper is eternal... the shadows never fade...
The embers reignite... the blazing soul still accompanies them...
The dirge rises again... the dead still find no rest...

overload.text: It seems the ship is as fragile as ever...
Too bad I can't personally charge into the frenzied frontlines...
Being incapacitated is just the prelude to true suffering...

death.text: Congratulations... you've successfully defeated the Reaper's phantom...
Perhaps... next time you'll have a chance to face the real one...
Maybe... not until the stars shatter will I meet my end...

victory.text: A god who easily takes the lives of mortals is never worth praising...
At least the brave die by the Reaper's blade, which harvests souls...
The afterlife never opens its doors to those in the sorrowful sector...
Too bad the so-called afterlife is just a distant, unreachable dream...
